fullText:

name: Solana
fullText:
Happy 6th birthday Solana fam.

They said it's dead. The code persisted. 
They said move on. The network's never been stronger.

fullText: BREAKING: Trump may postpone scheduled China trip if China does not agree to help reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

name: 0xkevin (🖤 , 💙)
fullText:
很多人觉得币圈刺激，原来在2014年的A股面前不值一提

一边是机构，一边是游资，900亿多空资金决战东方财富

东方财富单日成交 900.38亿元，打破 17年个股成交纪录

那一天的盘面几乎像战场：
东财直冲 29元新高，随后剧烈震荡，振幅超过 26%
而另一边，全市场5000多只股票下跌，800多只跌停... https://t.co/rYeT2Jr8kt
